summary: #2a -> #2b end-to-end recall on real ID photos: re-upload the same 119 real CNNC employee ID photos (already ingested via Path A as owner_type='person') into a SECOND project as owner_type='wo_raw' (no owner_id, no employee_no) and verify that the production recognition path matches every photo back to its corresponding persons row via the cross-project identity_embeddings gallery. End-to-end EID truth-table check: 119/119 OK, 0 mismatch.

inputs.source: same 119 real CNNC ID photos used by #2a-real Path A (Asian faces, Chinese filenames)

recognition_stats.face_matched_score_note: Perfect 1.0000 cosine across all 119 -- expected, since the wo_raw photo bytes are byte-identical to the photos that seeded the 'initial' gallery in Path A (so the ArcFace embedding is identical).

eid_truth_table.description: For each wo_raw photo, look up detections.matched_owner_id -> persons.employee_no and assert it equals the employee_no parsed from the photo's filename.

comparison_with_path_a.path_a_action: Seed gallery: 119 owner_type='person' uploads -> identity_embeddings(source='initial') x 119
comparison_with_path_a.this_run_action: End-to-end recall: 119 owner_type='wo_raw' uploads -> SCRFD detect -> ArcFace embed -> gallery lookup against the 119 source-project 'initial' embeddings -> assign matched_owner_id
comparison_with_path_a.this_run_proves: Cross-project gallery recall is healthy on real-world Asian-face data; the #2a person bootstrap path (Path A) actually feeds the production recall path (#2b) end-to-end.

embedding_gallery_growth.note: Each wo_raw face matched against the gallery also writes an 'incremental' embedding back to identity_embeddings (online gallery enhancement; finetune.rs gallery half of the active-learning loop, M2 turn 11). 119 new 'incremental' rows after full drain.

server_health.sample_log_tail: INFO SCRFD detected faces face_count=1 + INFO YOLOv8 detected objects object_count=1..2

secondary_findings.observation: YOLOv8 fires on ID photos at 1.798 tool detections per photo (214 / 119), all unmatched against gallery (gallery has no tool embeddings).
secondary_findings.comparison: Lower than the #2-tool COCO val2017 baseline of 3.26 / photo; consistent with ID photos containing fewer COCO classes. The 1.80 hits are likely shirt-collar / lanyard / badge / hard-hat -- to be confirmed at #5-bootstrap retrain selection time.
secondary_findings.impact: None on #2a recall (face match path). Pure detector noise on a different target_type.
secondary_findings.action: Will be addressed by #5-bootstrap (first fine-tuned YOLOv8n weights from accumulated v_training_corrections).

validation_queries.photos_status: SELECT status, count(*) FROM photos WHERE project_id=:dst GROUP BY status;
validation_queries.detections_breakdown: SELECT target_type, match_status, matched_owner_type, count(*) FROM detections WHERE project_id=:dst GROUP BY 1,2,3;
validation_queries.matched_score_face: SELECT min(matched_score), avg(matched_score), max(matched_score), count(*) FROM detections WHERE project_id=:dst AND target_type='face' AND match_status='matched';
validation_queries.distinct_matched_persons: SELECT count(DISTINCT matched_owner_id) FROM detections WHERE project_id=:dst AND target_type='face' AND match_status='matched';
validation_queries.eid_truth_table_join: SELECT d.photo_id, p.employee_no FROM detections d JOIN persons p ON p.id=d.matched_owner_id WHERE d.project_id=:dst AND d.target_type='face' AND d.match_status='matched';
validation_queries.identity_embeddings_growth: SELECT source, count(*) FROM identity_embeddings GROUP BY source;

reproducer.prereq: Path A done; 119 persons + 119 identity_embeddings(source='initial') exist in src project.
steps: # 2. run reverse smoke (uploads as wo_raw, no owner_id)
# 3. wait for worker drain (poll photos.status NOT IN (matched,unmatched,failed) until 0)
# 4. run truth-table join check (see validation_queries.eid_truth_table_join + python set-comparison vs reverse_report.json)
